summary.intent: Implement production-usable filtering, pagination, and search for the crm.matters.* RPC methods in a Rust legal CRM system (CHA-17), extending the existing basic CRUD skeleton to match the patterns established by crm.contacts.*
summary.outcome: Successfully implemented full-stack filtering/pagination/search for crm.matters.list across 6 files: extended store trait with 7-arg list_matters_filtered, updated SQLite and memory impls, changed service trait signature, updated LiveCrmService to parse JSON filter params, and updated the RPC handler. All 496 tests pass, clippy clean, rustfmt clean.

repo: The codebase uses a dynamic SQL string concatenation pattern for filtered queries (not a query builder) — all values are bound via ? params so there's no SQL injection risk, but adding filters requires careful string surgery
The CrmStore trait uses async_trait with default implementations to provide DRY delegation (e.g., list_matters delegates to list_matters_filtered with max limit)
The RPC dispatch chain is: ws.rs → methods/mod.rs (authorize) → methods/services.rs (register handlers) → CrmService trait → LiveCrmService → CrmStore → SqliteCrmStore
secrecy::Secret<String> is used for PII fields in CRM types
The project uses a pinned nightly toolchain (nightly-2025-11-30) for rustfmt — must use cargo +nightly-2025-11-30 fmt
sqlx migrations use the migrate! macro; new migration files follow pattern YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_description.sql
crm_matters table had indexes on updated_at, contact_id, status but was missing phase and practice_area indexes
The crm.contacts.list RPC also ignores filter params and calls unfiltered list — same gap exists there but was explicitly deferred
Linear API uses GraphQL; the issues(filter: { identifier: }) endpoint is deprecated — use searchIssues(term: 'CHA-17', first: 3) instead
The context-mode MCP sandbox does not inherit shell environment variables like LINEAR_API_KEY — must use $(printenv LINEAR_API_KEY) inline

code.finding: list_matters_filtered extended from 2 args (contact_id, practice_area) to 7 args (contact_id, status, phase, practice_area, search, offset, limit); list_matters() and list_matters_by_contact() now have default trait impls delegating to list_matters_filtered
Old list_matters() at line 341 and list_matters_by_contact() at line 375 were removed; now covered by trait defaults; list_matters_filtered does dynamic SQL with WHERE 1=1 pattern
Memory store had duplicate import of MatterStatus in test module causing clippy unused_import warning — fixed by removing inline use statement
LiveCrmService::list_matters signature changed from () to (params: Value); null/empty params route to list_matters() for backward compat, any filter key routes to list_matters_filtered
crm.matters.list handler updated to pass ctx.params to crm.list_matters(ctx.params)
CrmService trait list_matters() changed to list_matters(params: Value) to match all other CRM list methods; NoopCrmService updated accordingly

workflow: The Stokowski autonomous agent pipeline runs: ceo-review → eng-review → implement, each as separate context sessions with Linear as the coordination mechanism
Linear workpad comments are the primary artifact for cross-session state — if the comment fails to post, subsequent pipeline stages have no context
Running cargo check on a CSS file error (style.css) is pre-existing noise unrelated to Rust changes — safe to ignore
The BIG CHANGE classification (6 files, 0 new classes) still fits within a single PR when following an established pattern
TodoWrite tool was used extensively to track multi-file implementation progress across the context-limited session

friction: Linear comment failed to post in eng-review Run 1 (silent failure), causing user confusion and requiring a Run 2 to diagnose and fix
Linear GraphQL API issues endpoint is deprecated — took multiple trial-and-error attempts to find the correct searchIssues query
context-mode MCP sandbox doesn't inherit shell env vars, requiring workaround with $(printenv LINEAR_API_KEY) inline
Session ran out of context mid-implementation (store_memory.rs edits in progress) requiring compaction and resumption
CEO review session got stuck calling AskUserQuestion in a headless/autonomous context where no human input is expected
The eng-review skill was invoked 3 times for the same run due to orchestration retry logic
open_items: crm.contacts.list has the same filtering gap — also calls unfiltered list_contacts() ignoring params; explicitly deferred as separate issue
Status transition validation (prevent archived → open without explicit override) — deferred
crm.matters.stats aggregate endpoint (count by status/practice_area) — deferred
Sort parameter (sortBy/sortOrder) for matter listing — deferred
FTS5 full-text search for matters (current LIKE-based search acceptable at expected volumes) — deferred
UUID validation on IDs in parse_matter — pre-existing gap across all CRM entity parsers, deferred for consistency
Duplicate now_ms() function in crates/crm/src/types.rs and crates/gateway/src/crm_service.rs — minor DRY violation, deferred
PR was staged and committed but transcript ends before gh pr create — PR may not have been created and linked to Linear
